name: Fleet Codebase Architecture Recall
description: Stores fleet dispatch system architecture details, then tests whether the agent can recall specific module responsibilities and data flow patterns.

payload.value: The fleet dispatch system has three main modules: DispatchEngine (assigns vehicles to orders using constraint optimization), RouteOptimizer (calculates shortest paths with traffic-aware weights), and SurgeDetector (monitors real-time demand using sliding window statistics). Data flows: orders → DispatchEngine → RouteOptimizer → vehicle assignments. SurgeDetector feeds multipliers into DispatchEngine pricing.

steps.query: How does the surge detection system affect vehicle dispatch?
